chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-28 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.04.2021 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahesar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio, Advocate for the respondent No.6. == After arguing this matter at some length, counsel for the petitioner chose not to press the present petition, if the application for the petitioner is considered for position of PST in the like manner where the petitioner in C.P. No.D-1297 of 2014 were considered by the respondents District Education Dadu; the petition is dismissed accordingly and this petitioner be treated in the mutatis mutandis manner in which the petitioners in C.P.No.D-1297 of 2014 were treated provided however that before passing any adverse order against private respondents they must be given an opportunity to defend themselves. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
